series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence, legal documents, CERCLA, and 103-C notifications for unregulated sites.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Continually maintain and update microfilm in operating area ; Paper: Retain five years in operating area destroy data deemed not useful and microfilm data deemed useful. Destroy hardcopy after microfilm is checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
